claim: Cross-check confirms explorer claim: YOLO demand evidence dispatch implements boundary audit at src/demand/evidence-dispatch.ts:97-121, 566-597, 585-597 with SHA-256 mutation detection and PRD readiness blocker conversion.

evidence.summary: buildBoundarySnapshot() computes SHA-256 hashes at line 91 (createHash('sha256').update(readFileSync(path)).digest('hex')) and excludes allowed roots at line 104. diffBoundarySnapshots() at lines 111-121 compares before/after states.
evidence.why: Independent verification of boundary snapshot mechanism

evidence.summary: Line 516 captures boundaryBefore, line 566 captures boundaryAfter, line 567 computes diff. Confirms execution flow captured at correct locations.
evidence.why: Verification of boundary audit integration points

evidence.summary: Lines 585-590 map boundaryChanges to BOUNDARY_PROJECT_MUTATION blockers. Lines 591-597 merge blockers into finalReadiness and set prd_ready=false.
execution_policy.boundary sets project_mutation='forbidden' and allowed_write_roots=[output_dir]. Confirms boundary configuration.
requiredEvidenceRoles() returns ['explorer', 'cross-checker', 'verifier'] for cross_check policy at line 476.
DEMAND_EVIDENCE_AGENT_PROTOCOLS defines cross_checker with writes_code=false and required_when='evidence_policy === cross_check'.
projectEvidenceBlockingIssues() validates that project-scope evidence includes repo-relative paths at lines 514-516, 518-523.
evidence.why: Verification of project evidence path validation

evidence.summary: inspectDemandTriage() sets evidence_policy='cross_check' when technicalRisk or highCost are true at lines 656-658.
evidence.why: Verification of cross_check policy selection logic

evidence.summary: spawnProviderPrompt() executes child process at lines 133-137, captures stdout/stderr at lines 138-146, returns structured result at lines 183-193.
Claude CLI arguments include --tools, --allowedTools, --disallowedTools for tool profile control.

risks: No independent verification exists that boundary audit correctly detects mutations in real-world scenarios with full-tool Claude agents.
SHA-256 digest computation may not handle symlinks, special files, or concurrent modifications correctly.
allowed_write_roots exclusion logic may have edge cases if output_dir paths are not properly normalized.
missing: Integration test or manual verification showing boundary audit detects mutations when full-tool Claude agents execute in evidence dispatch.
Evidence showing boundary behavior with dirty working tree (uncommitted changes) before agent execution.
Verification that allowed_write_roots at line 246 correctly excludes .yolo/demand/evidence/* from mutation detection.
Test coverage showing boundary detection when agents attempt writes outside allowed roots.

result.notes: Cross-check independently confirms all explorer claims. Line numbers accurate, code logic verified. Missing verification evidence for stress-test scenarios and dirty working tree behavior as noted in missing array.
